title: eFootball  PES 2020

notes:
I am only rating PES as Gold because like previous PES games, it will not launch in full screen if you have a screen resolution above 1080p. I game at 4K!
Therefore, you will need to either install the game on a Windows box or VM, run the settings and select options you want, close the settings window, go to the KONAMI folder and grab a copy of the "settings.dat" file.
Next go to the WINE prefix for the game, 
~/steamapps/compatdata/996480/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/KONAMI/
paste the settings file inside the folder.
Launch the game and you should have PES 2020 in full screen.
If you don't have a Windows install or Windows VM you can follow instructions at
https://wiki.sgripon.net/doku.php/run_pro_evolution_soccer_2019_in_fullscreen_mode_on_steam_on_ubuntu_linux
title: eFootball  PES 2020

title: eFootball  PES 2020

notes: Runs out of box but for change settings need some additional work. For change settings like full screen mode I recommend create new wine 64bit prefix then install dotnet472 (Skip all errors about 32 bit prefix and every else) after this run settings.exe inside pes directory. When we change settings by clicking OK. The program will create settings.dat under KONAMI directory in our linux Document folder  all what we need to do is copy this file and past it to Document's inside PES prefix created by steam.
title: eFootball  PES 2020

notes:
To everybody who has problems to start the game stucking at the konami screen... I ran the debug mode and found out that there was a problem with the dot net framework.
Here my recipe:
0. Delete $HOME/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/996470
1. WINEPREFIX=$HOME/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/996470/pfx winetricks -q vcrun2015
2. Run Game from Steam
title: eFootball  PES 2020

notes:
Hi,
I had problems after the last update. The game stucked at the konami splash screen. I ran the game in debug mode and found out there was a problem with the dot net framework.
Here my recipe which worked for me:

0. Delete $HOME/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/996470
1. WINEPREFIX=$HOME/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/996470/pfx winetricks -q vcrun2015
2. Run Game from Steam
title: eFootball  PES 2020

notes: Do not disable VSYNC because screen will flickering
title: eFootball  PES 2020

notes:
It stopped on screen after konami loading. 
I turned off Esync and Fsync but it no work.
title: eFootball  PES 2020

notes:
I had the same problem as all of us (last update => stuck on splash screen). Thanks to one of the posts, i can finally play again.

==> I followed the steps:
(1) install winetricks
(2) backup my game settings folder <996470/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/MyDocuments/KONAMI>
(3) Delete hole 996470 folder
(4) Open terminal and type WINEPREFIX=yourPathToCompatFolder/996470/pfx winetricks -q vcrun2015
(5) Run game
(6) Exit game once default profile created
(7)  Past/Override settings folder
(8) Enjoy
| ==> # Big thank you to the guy that found the solution
title: eFootball  PES 2020

notes: Even after the Winetricks trick, it doesn't get past the red Konami screen and crashes.
